meaning: n.鑻卞浗鍥芥暀,鑻卞浗鍥芥暀鏁欎箟
examples: His mind was never settled again in Anglicanism.
Anglicanism is the established religion in England.
Other groups sought to promote High Church ritual within Anglicanism.
From the Church's view there's a need to show how Anglicanism is the answer to their questions.
The Alpha course came out of the more puritanical low-church end of Anglicanism.
